name: Medium Decorative Basket - Cream - Cloud Island™
description:
Keep your baby's room organized and tidy with this Medium Decorative Basket from cloud island™. This decorative storage basket features a cream woven construction adorned with circular fuzzy texture for fun style. Designed with attached handles for easy portability, this round medium-size basket is great for stowing toys, baby blankets, diapers, baby clothes and other essentials, and is easy to spot clean.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
